title: Yijing Hexagram 28: Da Guo (Preponderance of the Great)
description: Hexagram 28 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 28 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Preponderance of the Great. The ridgepole sags to the breaking point. It furthers one to have somewhere to go.
